_instructions.description: Auth configuration for Solveyra wiki. Password stored as SHA256 hash for security.
_instructions.generateHash: To generate a new password hash, open browser DevTools console and run: await hashPassword('YOUR_PASSWORD', 'YOUR_SALT')
_instructions.example: If using password 'Solveyra' with salt 'solv-wiki-salt-2025', first run the generateHash command to get the hash value, then paste it below.
_instructions.security: Storing hash here instead of in code prevents immediate exposure. Still keep this repo private.
